scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix utlis install && npm --prefix event-bus install && npm --prefix request-bus install && npm --prefix user install && npm --prefix auth install && npm --prefix catalog install && npm --prefix review install && npm --prefix gateway install
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n event,request,user,auth,catalog,review,gateway -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,red "npm run start:event-bus" "sleep 2 && npm run start:request-bus" "sleep 3 && npm run start:user" "sleep 4 && npm run start:auth" "sleep 5 && npm run start:catalog" "sleep 5 && npm run start:review" "sleep 7 && npm run start:gateway"
